products.title: VOXEL GALAXY PETG+ HS (Pro) Aurora Green 1.75mm Filament (1kg)
products.body_html:
ONLY 200 ROLLS IN STOCK - SHIP SAME DAY - FREE SHIPPING ON ORDERS $75+ (MIX AND MATCH ANY PRODUCTS)

Color: Aurora Green Galaxy PETG+ HS (PRO) PETG 3D Printing Filament

Diameter: 1.75mm ± 0.03mm ; Bambu Lab AMS / AMS Lite Compatible

Hotend Temp: 230-265C

Bed Temp: 70-85C

Free Shipping in the USA on orders $75 or more!

VOXELPETG+ PETG (PRO) Filament for FDM 3D printer is perfect for everyone. The best and most reliable filament at an affordable price. 

All VOXELPETG+ is engineered with reliability, quality, and strength as its top priority. We run VOXELPETG+ PETG (pro) exclusively on our 250 machines print farm to ensure the utmost quality and reliability in real-life production settings. Our PETG+ (pro) lineup contains special additives to make it more robust and reliable than standard PETG. The strength test results and methodology is included in the Safety and Technical Date Sheets below.

All 3D Printing accessories we sell are made using VOXELPLA+ and VOXELPETG+ in Southern California, USA.
